headline: ExchangeRight Fully Subscribes $58.6 Million Net-Leased Portfolio 72 DST
summary: PASADENA, Calif., June 09, 2026--ExchangeRight has announced the full subscription of Net-Leased Portfolio 72 DST, a $58.6 million portfolio of net-leased real estate.
